instruction: Add an optional `min_run` parameter (default `1`). Only include a `(value, count)` tuple in the output when the run length is at least `min_run`. Raise `ValueError` with a descriptive message when `min_run < 1`. With `min_run=1`, all runs are included and the output is identical to the original function. All other behaviour (encoding consecutive runs, returning empty list for empty input, preserving order) must remain unchanged.
